text:
うん、ちゃんと揃ってるわね！
状態もいいし、問題ないわ。

無事に帰ってきたみたいだし
頑張ってくれたみたいね！

ちゃんと報酬はあるからね。
ほら！

ま、ともかくお疲れ様！
それじゃ、また

Yep, you got 'em all! And they're all in good
condition, so no problems there.

Looks like you came back safe and sound,
so you must've worked your butt off out there!
Don't worry, I didn't forget your reward. Here!
Anyway, excellent work! See you later!
